title: Logical error: 'Files metadata is empty' with fault injection
description:
### Describe the bug
cc @kssenii easy to reproduce
### How to reproduce
With:
```xml
<named_collections>
<s3>
<url>....</url>
<access_key_id>...</access_key_id>
<secret_access_key>...</secret_access_key>
</s3>
</named_collections>
<storage_configuration>
<disks>
<disk0>
<type>object_storage</type>
<object_storage_type>s3</object_storage_type>
<metadata_type>plain_rewritable</metadata_type>
<endpoint>...</endpoint>
<access_key_id>...</access_key_id>
<secret_access_key>..</secret_access_key>
</disk0>
</disks>
</storage_configuration>
```
Run:
```sql
CREATE DATABASE d0 ENGINE = Atomic SETTINGS disk = 'disk0';
CREATE TABLE d0.t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = S3Queue(s3, filename = 'subdir/', format = 'CSV') SETTINGS mode = 'ordered';
SYSTEM ENABLE FAILPOINT plain_object_storage_write_fail_on_directory_create;
DROP TABLE d0.t0; --DB::Exception: Injecting fault when creating 'metadata_dropped/' directory: While committing metadata operation #0. (FAULT_INJECTED)
ALTER TABLE d0.t0 MODIFY SETTING commit_on_select = 1;
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'Files metadata is empty'.
<Fatal> : Format string: 'Files metadata is empty'.
<Fatal> : Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x0000000026499572
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:136: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x00000000161b37e9
2. src/Common/Exception.h:172: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d801bd4
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d8016d1
4. src/Common/Exception.h:190: DB::Exception::Exception<>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<>) @ 0x00000000161bc239
5. src/Storages/ObjectStorageQueue/StorageObjectStorageQueue.cpp:1390: DB::StorageObjectStorageQueue::checkAlterIsPossible(DB::AlterCommands const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) const @ 0x000000001fe5412d
6. src/Interpreters/InterpreterAlterQuery.cpp:274: DB::InterpreterAlterQuery::executeToTable(DB::ASTAlterQuery const&) @ 0x000000001c4320c2
7. src/Interpreters/InterpreterAlterQuery.cpp:85: DB::InterpreterAlterQuery::execute() @ 0x000000001c42f44d
8. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1748: DB::executeQueryImpl(char const*, char const*, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum, std::unique_ptr<DB::ReadBuffer, std::default_delete<DB::ReadBuffer>>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::ImplicitTransactionControlExecutor>, std::function<void ()>, DB::QueryResultDetails&) @ 0x000000001c85c1a8
9. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1972: DB::executeQuery(String const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum) @ 0x000000001c855914
10. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:774: DB::TCPHandler::runImpl() @ 0x00000000200a4109
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 TEXT, c2 REAL, c3 INTEGER);
key_bug_features: Fault injection during metadata operation causes empty files error
